meaning: adj.整洁的,整齐的,短小精悍的,小巧玲珑的,潇洒的,衣冠楚楚的
examples: At the words, the door opened and a dapper little old man came in.
All hats make a man look more dapper.
A dapper gentleman of about sixty stepped into the room and faced us.
Dapper gentlemen frequent Harry Rosen and the nouvelle barbershop Cru , both in Yorkville.
Urbane and dapper, 45-year-old Najib was once aligned with Anwar, but past history will mean little.
